title: Create: Central Kitchen
description: Offering more tools and methods to automate food processing of other mod in Create.
body:
## Welcome to Create: Central Kitchen 2.0, a mod offering more tools and methods to automate food processing for other mods in Create.

> Create: Central Kitchen has been redesigned for version 2.0, and the content of version 1.0 will be divided into three modules, corresponding to three separate mods:  
> - Farming Automation: [**Create: Integrated Farming**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-integrated-farming);  
> - Cooking Automation: Create: Central Kitchen;  
> - Ingredients & Recipes: _In developement_;  

### We currently offer:
* Packager unpacking support for Cooking Pot (Farmer's Delight, includes variation from other FD addons), Keg (Brewin' and Chewin'), Chiller (Extra Delight) and Oven (Extra Delight).
* Mechanical Arm interaction support for vairous Cooking Pots, Skillet, Stove, Cutting Board, Chiller, Oven and Blazier.
* Mechanical Arm insertion for working stations which have Packager unpacking support is for container slot only, as the ingredient slots is properly handled by Packager unpacking.
* Mechanical Arms can take servings from Farmer’s Delight feast blocks and slices from pie blocks.
* Add Heat Source support for all Boiler Heaters.
* Add Freezer Source support for Kegs.
* Active Boiler Heaters now speeds up Cooking Pot and Skillet cooking.
* Automatically transform Cutting Board recipes (Farmer's Delight) that uses knife into Sawing recipes.
* Automatically transform Cutting Board recipes (Farmer's Delight) into Deploying recipes.
* Automatically transform Keg Pouring recipes (Brewin' and Chewin') into Filling and Draining recipes.
* Automatically transform Mortar recipes, Juicer recipes (Extra Delight) into Pressing recipes.
* Automatically transform Meling Pot recipes (Extra Delight) into Mixing recipes.
* Automatically transform Tool on Block (Gingerbread Decorating) recipes (Extra Delight) into Deploying recipes.
* Add Tree Bark (or Straw for Bamboo-like blocks) to runtime generated Sawing recipes for stripping wood/logs.

If you'd like to add more things, please suggest them to us [here](https://github.com/DragonsPlusMinecraft/CreateCentralKitchen/issues)!

### Installation Requirements
**Create** & [**Create: Dragons Plus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)

<details>
<summary>Legacy 1.+ Feature</summary>
  
### We currently offer:
* **Pie Overhaul**: Overhaul vanilla and modded pies in Farmer's Delight style, with placable blocks and slices.
Cake Slice Integration: Add cake slices for non Farmer's Delight add-ons.
* **Fluid Integration**: Provide fluid for sauces, drinks, ice creams and more!
* **Recipe Integration**: Added hundreds of integration recipes in Create style, including Sequenced Assembly Recipes for Sandwiches, Burgers and Pies.
* **Reasonable Automatic Mixing**: Shapeless Recipes with certain container items (Glass Bottle, Bowl, Bucket) involved are now excluded from Automatic Mixing.
* **Smarter Upright on Belt**: Items with certain containers (Glass Bottle, Bowl, Bucket) are now automatically rendered upright on belt, without needing specifying item tag create:upright_on_belt.
### Specifically, when Farmer's Delight is installed:
* **Blaze Stove**: Give your Blaze a guide and turn it into a master chef! Blaze Stove will provide Mechanical Arm support for kitchenwares including: Cooking Pot (Farmer's Delight), Kettle (Farmer's Respite), Copper Pot (Miner's Delight). Blaze Stove can also boost cooking up to 4x for the kitchenware above!
* **Cutting Board Recipe Automation**: Deployer can now perform Cutting Board Recipes (Farmer's Delight) on Belt and Depot.
* **Smarter Basket**: Basket (Farmer's Delight) can now directly interact with Belt and Mechanical Arm.
Harvester Compat: Harvester is now compatible with Mushroom Colonies (Farmer's Delight), Tea Bush (Farmer's Respite), Coffee (Farmer's Respite), Propelplant (Nether's Delight), Lime Bush (Collector's Reap), Pomegranate Bush (Collector's Reap) 


### Installation Requirements:
* Forge
* Create

### Supported Mods:  
* Create: Craft & Additions
* Create: Confectionery
* Farmer's Delight
* Farmer's Respite (1.20.1 Partial Support)
* Miner's Delight +
* Nether's Delight
* Atmospheric
* Autumnity
* Buzzier Bees
* Environmental
* Neapolitan
* Upgrade Aquatic
* Peculiars
* Seasonals
* Respiteful (1.18.2-1.19.2)
* Abnormal Delight
* Collector's Reap
* Cookielicious (1.18.2)
* Overweight Farming
* End's Delight
* Corn Delight
</details>
